title: NormArchetype
description: Schema for Norm Ascriptions — measurable constraint predicates (DNA 'N'). Defines the governance grammar: structure, qualifier, guard, predicate, toleranceMode, and mode-dependent temporal fields. DM validates CEL expressions against their profiles. Extensible — tenant-defined archetypes MAY extend Norm via allOf to add domain-specific measurement vocabulary while inheriting the governance grammar. DM input = DM output (1:1).

structure.description: ID reference to the authoring Structure.

qualifier.description: ID reference to the Archetype that the predicate constrains — mirrors Directive.qualifier. Enables governance chain validation and direct queryability ('all Norms targeting SecurityProperties') without CEL parsing.

guard.description: CEL expression conforming to the applicability-guard CEL profile — activation condition. Predicate is only evaluated when guard is true. Default: 'true' (unconditional).

predicate.description: CEL expression conforming to the property-assertion CEL profile → bool. References exactly one Archetype by name as root identifier, then navigates its JSON Schema fields.

toleranceMode.description: How violations are measured over time. Discriminates which temporal fields are required.

temporalWindow.description: ISO 8601 duration for time-based tolerance modes. Required when toleranceMode is AGGREGATED or SUSTAINED.

temporalAggregation.description: Aggregation function applied within the temporalWindow. Required when toleranceMode is AGGREGATED or SUSTAINED.

sustainedThreshold.description: Ratio [0,1] — fraction of temporalWindow the predicate must hold. Required when toleranceMode = SUSTAINED.
